title: Mytilene, North Aegean — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Mytilene, North Aegean: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.

Overview

Mytilene is a city in North Aegean with a population of 57,872. Lesbos’ capital with a stunning harbor, petrified forest, ouzo distilleries, and rich literary heritage.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
